title: Oairse Gold Ceramic Vase for Flowers 19cm Modern Round Textured Vase Decorative Flower Vases for Home Decor Table Centerpiece Mantel Shelf Office Party Wedding Decoration
features: Modern Ceramic Vase with Textured Gold Finish - This stylish ceramic vase features a shimmering gold surface with a unique ribbed texture, making it a statement piece for any modern home decor. The combination of metallic elegance and handcrafted design enhances the overall aesthetic of your living room, bedroom, or hallway. Whether used on its own or with faux florals, it adds a luxury accent to your space.

Perfect Size - Measuring 7.5" tall and 7.9" wide (19 x 20cm), this round ceramic vase is perfectly sized, very space-saving for a wide range of decor setups. Use it as a table centerpiece, shelf decor, or mantel accent to add eye-catching and character to your interior design.

Versatile Display - With a 1.2" (3cm) narrow opening, this vase is designed to hold artificial plants, dried flowers, pampas grass, or minimalist stems. It’s an excellent choice for those who prefer low-maintenance decor that still looks full of life. Pair it with eucalyptus, orchids, or faux tulips to elevate your entryway or coffee table.

Durable and Stable Construction - Made from premium ceramic, this vase is built to last. The weighted bottom adds stability, while the non-slip pad underneath protects your surfaces from scratches and ensures the vase stays firmly in place. It’s both functional and decorative - a reliable piece for everyday home use.

A Thoughtful Gift for Any Occasion - This elegant decorative vase makes a perfect gift for housewarmings, weddings, birthdays, or holidays. Its timeless gold finish complements various home styles such as contemporary, glam, and minimalist interiors. Packaged with care, it's ready to impress any recipient who loves tasteful and practical home accessories.
description: The ceramic flower vase features a striking round silhouette with a textured gold finish that adds a luxurious yet modern touch to your interior decor. Designed to complement both artificial flowers and dried arrangements, this decorative vase creates a stunning visual impact with minimal effort. Whether you're styling a single faux pampas stem or a bunch of dried lavender, this gold ceramic vase elevates your flower arrangements with elegance and style. This modern gold vase is perfect for enhancing any room—living room, bedroom, bathroom shelf, or office desk. Its compact size fits beautifully on narrow shelves, kitchen countertops, entryway consoles, or dining tables. The narrow 3cm opening keeps floral stems upright and balanced, making it ideal for minimalist, boho, or modern-style arrangements. The vase is made of durable ceramic with a hand-crafted feel, and the gold coating has a brushed, textured surface that catches light beautifully. A non-slip pad at the bottom protects your furniture and provides stability on smooth surfaces. It’s not just a vase - it’s a sculptural piece that adds style and charm wherever it is placed. This gold vase is also a thoughtful gift for flower lovers, interior design enthusiasts, or anyone who enjoys home styling. It makes an excellent present for housewarmings, birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, or seasonal holidays like Thanksgiving and Christmas. This stylish ceramic vase is suitable for: faux flower vase decor, dried flower arrangement, artificial eucalyptus vase filler, table centerpieces, mantle decor, bookshelf decor, kitchen table accents, bathroom counter styling, office desk ornaments, modern gold decor, and more. Specifications: Material: Ceramic Color: Gold Dimensions: 7.5" H x 7.9" W (19cm x 20cm) Top Opening: 3cm (1.2")
